response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack/web developer with strong TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang background, but the role requires 8 years of C++ programming and 5 years building large-scale distributed infrastructure or compute platforms. C++ exposure is limited to a ~6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015, far short of the minimum bar. No demonstrated cloud compute platform architecture or technical leadership over cloud/DevOps engineers. Skills do not align with the core requirements.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering experience across web, mobile, and embedded
Founder of an open-source platform deployable on Kubernetes
Track record of mentoring via workshops, talks, and courses
concerns: Only ~6 months of C++ experience vs. required 8 years
No large-scale distributed systems or cloud compute platform leadership
No formal technical lead role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform / distributed infra leadership
